title: Rig Veda 9.112: Everyone Wants Wealth
description: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.
introduction: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.

translation.text: The carpenter wants a breakdown, the physician a fracture, the priest a worshipper. I am a poet, my father a physician, my mother grinds corn. All want wealth.
